summary: Completed testing of BIBI Cars CRM Marketing Module with Facebook CAPI + Auto Budget Optimizer + Admin Analytics Dashboard. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate), but frontend integration incomplete.

integration_issues.issue: Component exists but not integrated into routing - no route defined in App.js
analytics.js utility exists but not imported or initialized in main App.js

missing_features.issue: No route exists to access AdminAnalyticsDashboard component
Analytics tracking not initialized on app startup

passed_tests: AdminAnalyticsDashboard component exists and is properly structured
Analytics utility functions are properly implemented
action_item_for_main_agent: 1. Add AdminAnalyticsDashboard route to App.js (e.g., /admin/analytics). 2. Import and initialize analytics.js utility in App.js with initAnalytics() call. 3. Add navigation link to analytics dashboard in admin layout. 4. Set FB_PIXEL_ID and FB_ACCESS_TOKEN environment variables for Facebook CAPI integration.
